# docs

Strategic product requirements, technical architecture, regulatory compliance specifications, and business model definitions for Zeee Pitch Zooo — an enterprise-grade multimodal RAG platform transforming venture capital pitch decks into interactive AI-powered due diligence systems with mandatory Human-in-the-Loop validation.

## Contents

**[prd.md](./prd.md)**: Defines product vision addressing VC information asymmetry (3 minutes 44 seconds average deck review time), competitive differentiation vs Beautiful.ai/Gamma/Pitch.com (RAG-powered interactive due diligence vs static broadcast), core HierFinRAG/MultiFinRAG technical architecture with TTGNN (1000x search space reduction, 19-percentage-point accuracy improvement over GPT-4o), symbolic-neural fusion with modality-aware retrieval (80% text threshold, 65% image threshold), mandatory HITL validation workflows (99.9% accuracy vs 92% AI-only baseline), behavioral analytics with predictive intent scoring via decision tree algorithms, narrative A/B testing with Bayesian/DiD/CUPED statistical controls, institutional VDR security (SOC 2 Type II, AES-256, TLS 1.3, dynamic watermarking), EU AI Act compliance requirements (continuous RMS, technical documentation, transparency obligations), LLMOps prompt versioning with RAG Triad evaluation framework (Context Relevance, Groundedness, Answer Relevance, MRR, NDCG), CRM/Slack ecosystem integration, tiered SaaS monetization ($50-$150/month Starter, $500+/month Professional, Enterprise/M&A with transactional upside).

## Behavioral Contracts

VC attention economy: **3 minutes 44 seconds** average pitch deck review time before pipeline decision. Early-stage deck deficiency: **85%** lack necessary financial projections stalling diligence. M&A value destruction: **60%** of deals destroy shareholder value due to undiscovered operational inefficiencies. AI adoption projection: **75%** of early-stage investor reviews AI-informed by end of **2026**. HITL enterprise adoption: **76%** mandate HITL to intercept hallucinations; **47%** of enterprise AI users made major decisions on fabricated content. HITL accuracy: **99.9%** with strict governance vs **92%** AI-only baseline. MultiFinRAG accuracy: **19-percentage-point increase** over GPT-4o on complex financial Q&A. TTGNN efficiency: **1000x** search space reduction. Modality thresholds: **80%** similarity for text, **65%** for images/charts. HITL confidence gate: queries below **85%** routed for mandatory review. Prompt iteration: **4–8 hours** with dedicated tooling vs **3–5 days** sluggish baseline. MTTR: under **12 minutes** with granular rollback vs **18.5 hours** industry average. Slack command: `/zee-deck search <firm_name>`.
